experiences.title: Executive - Design
experiences.headline: Large-scale campaign visuals for nonprofit and foundation clients.
experiences.summary: Designed high-quality creative assets, motion-ready campaign visuals, brand systems, and social content while collaborating with cross-functional teams.
experiences.impact: 50M+ campaign views, 2x donor conversion lift, 5+ creative awards

experiences.title: Communications Designer
experiences.headline: Social campaigns, brand content, graphics, and video pieces for multiple brands.
experiences.summary: Created content grids, designed campaigns, wrote copy, and produced visuals for brands across lifestyle, retail, coffee, and fashion.
experiences.impact: 150+ graphics and videos, 6+ brands, 15% engagement lift

experiences.title: Founder / Creative Entrepreneur
experiences.headline: Illustration-led creative business with custom products and repeat clients.
experiences.summary: Owned the full creative process from illustration, layout, product design, and packaging to social marketing and client communication.
experiences.impact: 500+ repeat clients through Instagram, referrals, and direct orders

projects.title: Gates Foundation Campaign Visuals
projects.summary: Designed, retouched, and composited campaign visuals for cross-channel nonprofit storytelling while keeping the creative aligned to brand and campaign goals.
projects.impact: Part of campaign work that contributed to 50M+ views and 2x donor conversion lift

projects.title: Anil Agarwal Foundation Motion Stories
projects.tools: After Effects, Premiere Pro, Illustrator, Photoshop
projects.summary: Created animated visual stories and social-first video assets using illustration, motion design, editing, and brand-led storytelling.
projects.impact: Supported award-winning digital work, including Fulcrum and STAKES recognition

projects.title: Brand Guidelines + AI Design Experiments
projects.summary: Explored multiple visual directions, documented brand rules, tested AI-assisted creative workflows, and improved design consistency across campaign assets.

projects.title: Dayal Opticals Social Campaign
projects.summary: Created campaign concepts, social posts, and promotional layouts that matched the brand's personality while staying consistent across the monthly content grid.
projects.impact: Part of 25-day advance social planning workflow

projects.title: Devan's Coffee Content Grid
projects.summary: Designed coffee-led social content, copy-led posts, layouts, and video pieces with a warm visual language for digital engagement.
projects.impact: Contributed to 150+ graphics and videos across brand accounts

projects.title: LizPaul Campaign Assets
projects.summary: Built visual assets and edited short-form campaign content while balancing brand accuracy, social pacing, and delivery timelines.

projects.title: The Creative Bud Brand Identity
projects.summary: Created the visual identity, illustration style, product templates, packaging, and social presence for a handmade personalized gifts brand.
projects.impact: Built a loyal base of 500+ repeat clients

projects.title: Personalized Illustration Products
projects.summary: Designed custom portraits, cards, stationery, calendars, notebooks, and printed products from concept to final customer delivery.
projects.impact: Managed client briefs, revisions, production, packaging, and fulfillment

projects.title: Product Photography + Social Content
projects.summary: Produced product photos, social posts, promotional graphics, and launch visuals to market handmade products online.
projects.impact: Grew the brand through social media, referrals, and direct client communication

initialSketch.label: Initial Sketch

about.headline: Graphic designer with campaign discipline and a handmade visual voice.
body: Prerna creates brand visuals, campaign assets, motion graphics, social content, illustration, and digital storytelling work. Her project showcase connects practical production skills with expressive, human visual details.
Recruiters can use the Work section to open each experience and see what she created there: campaign graphics, motion pieces, social layouts, illustration-led products, and brand systems.
